steps.title: Apply the percent increase formula
steps.content: Identify the original price (\$16), new price (\$80), and change (\$80 - \$16 = \$64).

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches $400\%$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore D is correct.
